articles.description: The court had ruled that the FEO tag was another way of coercing Bhandari to come back to India, by attachment, confiscation of his properties

articles.title: Dharmanagar Assembly bypoll in Tripura sees 52.76% voter turnout till 1 p.m.
articles.description: The bypoll was necessitated following the death of Assembly speaker Biswa Bandhu Sen of the BJP

articles.title: Argentina passes bill loosening protection of its glaciers
articles.description: The new bill will make it easier for provincial governments to allow mining projects in glacier regions.

articles.title: Andhra Pradesh headmaster booked for social media post against Chandrababu Naidu
3-6 months left to live: Yuvraj Singh on coming to terms with cancer
articles.description: months left to live Yuvraj Singh on coming to terms with cancer

articles.title: T.N. election: AIADMK’s promise of crop loan waiver raises questions of feasibility
articles.description: The AIADMK’s scheme covers crop loans obtained by farmers from primary agricultural credit cooperative societies (PACCS) and loans obtained by persons with disabilities and pavement vendors from cooperative banks.

articles.title: Voter treated as suspect, burdened to prove otherwise: CPI(M) letter to EC on Bengal voter deletions
articles.description: In a letter addressed to Chief Election Commissioner Gyanesh Kumar, Mr. Baby expressed "anguish, grave concern and strong protest" over the situation

articles.title: Steps into past: 1,500-year-old reservoir unearthed on Elephanta island
articles.description: Archaeological Survey of India excavation finds sophisticated stepped reservoir and proof of ancient maritime trade

topStories.title: Trump’s administration trying to sell war ‘wins’ to a sceptical US public
topStories.description: Trump’s administration trying to sell war ‘wins’ to a sceptical US public

topStories.title: US Has Declared Victory, But What Has It Accomplished In Iran?
topStories.description: Throughout the over-month-long conflict, Trump has made contradictory statements about his goals for Iran, including putting an end to the country's nuclear program, destroying its military...

topStories.title: Oil prices rise as concerns grow over 'fragile' US-Iran ceasefire
topStories.description: Crude prices have reversed from sharp falls on Wednesday when plans to pause the war first emerged.

topStories.title: Title ‘Swatantryaveer’ not conferred by government on Savarkar, grandnephew tells court
topStories.description: The defamation complaint alleges that Mr. Gandhi made statements against Savarkar on multiple occasions, including a speech on March 5, 2023, at the Overseas Congress event in the United Kingdom.

topStories.title: Several people reported killed in fresh Israeli attacks on Lebanon
topStories.description: Lebanon bears the brunt and US-Iran truce at risk as Israel claims killing of a close aide to Hezbollah's leader.

topStories.title: The war on Iran: Nobody won, everyone paid
topStories.description: The US-Israeli campaign has failed to achieve its goals. Iran has been badly hit, and the Gulf is paying the bill too.

topStories.title: Nobel Peace Prize for Shehbaz Sharif amid US-Iran ceasefire? — Pakistan raises demand after 15-day truce
topStories.description: Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif played a crucial role as a mediator in bringing about US-Iran ceasefire. His diplomatic efforts, along with those of Field Marshal Asim Munir, have led to calls for a Nobel Peace Prize recognition.

topStories.title: Assam election 2026 LIVE: 59.63% voter turnout recorded till 1 p.m.; CM Himanta, Congress MP Gaurav cast votes
topStories.description: Dudhnoi in Goalpara district recorded the highest turnout till 1 p.m. at 66.11%, while Dibrugarh witnessed the lowest at 50.85%, officials said

topStories.title: Sunetra Pawar set to win Baramati bypoll unopposed as Congress withdraws candidate
topStories.description: Congress said the party had initially gone ahead with its campaign after fielding Akash More for the Baramati bypoll. But the party has decided to withdraw now.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the day by Jim Whittaker, 1st American to summit Mount Everest: ‘When you live on the edge…’
dailyNews.description: Jim Whittaker, who is the first American to climb Mount Everest, wanted the readers to act.

dailyNews.title: Iran has been bloodied, but it is winning against the US-Israel axis
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel thought they could decimate Iran. But Iran's survival - despite massive human costs - is a victory.

dailyNews.title: Sitharaman likely to skip US visit as Parliament reconvenes to fast-track women quota
dailyNews.description: Sitharaman was expected to meet with CEOs, attend the World Bank and the International Monetary Fund (IMF) spring meetings

dailyNews.title: US-Iran war: Tehran announces alternative routes in Strait of Hormuz amid mine threat. What are they?
dailyNews.description: Trump announced a fragile two-week ceasefire with Iran, allowing passage through the Strait of Hormuz. However, the main shipping lane remains dangerous due to sea mines, prompting Iran to advise alternative routes.

dailyNews.title: Quote of the Day: Ex-Iraqi President Saddam Hussein on world politics - ‘The west need someone to tell the man…’
dailyNews.description: Saddam Hussein was Iraq's President from 1979 to 2003, known for his authoritarian rule and human rights abuses. He oversaw major conflicts, was removed by a U.S.-led invasion in 2003, captured, and executed in 2006 for crimes against humanity.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US forces to stay near Iran, ready for ‘next conquest’
dailyNews.description: US threats against Iran and ongoing Israeli attacks in Lebanon cast doubt on fragile ceasefire efforts.

dailyNews.title: Flip-flop on COP: Congress's dig at government on withdrawing bid to host COP33
dailyNews.description: It also calls into question the Modi government's true commitment to take on more ambitious carbon mitigation goals in the short and medium term, Congress leader Jairam Ramesh says

dailyNews.title: Did Trump's officials threaten Catholic Church? Vatican cancels White House’s invitation to host Pope Leo XIV
dailyNews.description: The US government under Trump threatened Catholic Church due to which Vatican postponed White House’s invitation to host Pope Leo XIV indefinitely. The Vatican viewed US official's comments as intimidation, prompting a reevaluation of diplomatic relations.

dailyNews.title: New exposé claims California lost at least $180B to fraud under Gavin Newsom
dailyNews.description: Journalist Chris Rufo alleges California lost between $180 and $280 billion to fraud under Gov. Gavin Newsom in Medi-Cal and welfare programs.

dailyNews.title: Nashville public school excuses Muslim students for daily prayer time during Ramadan
dailyNews.description: A Nashville public school is allowing Muslim students reserved prayer space and food-free classrooms during Ramadan, according to a local news report.

dailyNews.title: New ‘safer opioid’ delivers pain relief without addiction risk in early tests
dailyNews.description: An experimental opioid alternative called DFNZ achieved effective pain relief in mice without addiction risk or breathing suppression, a study found.

dailyNews.title: Trump wants a moon landing by 2028, so why is NASA already hedging?
dailyNews.description: NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman's shifting language on beating China to the moon raises questions about the viability of a 2028 lunar landing.

dailyNews.title: MORNING GLORY: President Trump leads the West to a big win against Iran
dailyNews.description: The two-week ceasefire with Iran hinges on whether the Strait of Hormuz reopens, a crucial test after five weeks of devastating military operations.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Purged Immigration Judges to Speed Up Deportations
dailyNews.description: Judges are ordering an unprecedented number of people deported after coming under significant pressure from the administration to do so or risk losing their jobs.

dailyNews.title: In a Deep Red Town In Pennsylvania, Locals Vent Over a Planned ICE Detention Center
dailyNews.description: The Tremont, Pa., area has roughly 2,000 residents and limited resources. The Trump administration plans to convert a warehouse there to hold nearly four times as many people.

dailyNews.title: On Truth Social, Trump Supporters Fume About Iran War
dailyNews.description: A growing chorus of disaffected Trump supporters is sounding off in the replies to his posts on the social media platform he founded.

dailyNews.title: On Social Media, Democratic Politicians Are Letting the F-Word Fly
dailyNews.description: In person, on social media and in campaign ads, Democratic politicians are swearing with glee. It is usually aimed at President Trump.

dailyNews.title: White House Secures Foreign Steel for Trump’s Ballroom Project
dailyNews.description: ArcelorMittal, a European steel maker, is donating tens of millions of dollars of foreign steel for President Trump’s new ballroom.

dailyNews.title: Climate Change Denial Sees a Resurgence in Trump’s Washington
dailyNews.description: A conference near the White House drew dozens of people who reject the scientific consensus on climate change. The mood was triumphant.

dailyNews.title: Trump's ceasefire with Iran mired in dispute over Israel's war in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: As Trump issues a new warning to Iran to comply with a tenuous two-week ceasefire, the two sides don't even seem to agree on the terms of the deal.

dailyNews.title: Iran accuses U.S. of violating ceasefire amid Israeli attacks on Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Iran says Israel is violating the ceasefire deal President Trump announced, and Tehran appears to still have control over shipping in the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: 4/8: The Takeout with Major Garrett
dailyNews.description: U.S.-Iran ceasefire in fragile place; NATO chief Mark Rutte meets with President Trump at the White House.

dailyNews.title: Judge postpones termination of TPS for Ethiopians in U.S.
dailyNews.description: It's the latest setback for the Trump administration on the issue, which has sought to terminate the TPS designation for 13 countries as part of the president's crackdown on immigration.

dailyNews.title: Ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. fragile amid continued strikes
dailyNews.description: With a fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran in place, Israel launched its biggest attacks yet against Iran-backed Hezbollah in Lebanon. Iran says Lebanon is part of the ceasefire, while the U.S. and Israel say it is not. The White House announced Vice President J.D. Vance will travel to Pakistan for negotiations with Iran. NBC News’ Gabe Gutierrez reports.

dailyNews.title: Oil plunges on Iran ceasefire news, setting the stage for some relief on gas prices
dailyNews.description: Stocks roared higher after President Trump announced a two-week ceasefire with Iran. Oil prices fell sharply, and gas prices are expected to follow.
